rationale: The citing paper references Datta, Foubert, and Van Heerde (2015) only in the methods section as one of two example studies that have used Gaussian copulas to address endogeneity. The actual methodological foundation is attributed to Park and Gupta (2012), while the cited paper is not used for theory development, hypotheses, measurement, or interpretation of results. Because it appears as a grouped precedent citation without a distinct role specific to that paper, the function is a passing methodological mention.
